idea-plugin.name: SVG Icon Preview
idea-plugin.description:
Shows a gutter icon preview for any field whose value is a data:image/svg+xml;base64,...

Features

  • Detects data:image/svg+xml;base64,... strings in your code and shows a gutter icon preview.
  • Clicking on the gutter icon opens a popup with a larger preview of the
  • Zero configuration - works out of the box
